author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Result: committed 77ebd350 on feature/576-publish-agent-container-image (off develop). 7 files / +449 -11. Subagent's full test suite (2764 passed) and the 5 new launch tests verified on this side. Honest gaps remain: pre-flight evidence #1 (CI green link) and #2 (docker pull against published nightly) only materialize after the user pushes — the workflow's smoke-verify job is the in-pipeline proof for them. Highest-risk piece in CI: arm64 musl cross-link uses gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu (glibc cross). May or may not work cleanly with all crates; first develop push will reveal. Standard fix if it red-lines: switch to messense/rust-musl-cross or cross-rs. Follow-up issue to file after merge: deduplicate or repoint crosslink container build (currently produces image with wrong name, uses embedded Dockerfile instead of live file, doesn't compose with kickoff).
